name: @prismtek/buddy-animation-template-pack
description: Reusable Buddy sprite animation template contracts, prompts, and examples for Prismtek game and agent companions.

scripts.validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['metadata.json','animation-contract/animation-schema.json','examples/buddy-animation-manifest.example.json','examples/buddy-variant.example.json']) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8')); console.log('buddy animation template pack json ok')"
